title: PTD National Leadership Sends Special Christmas & New Year Messages To Members, Other Nigerians - FinancialEDGE
description: LAs Nigerian Christians join others around the world to commemorate the birth of Jesus Christ, public officials, politicians and captains of industries across the country have released goodwill messages, preaching peace, love, unity and tolerance. Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG tops the list of leaders in Nigeria who have congratulated Christians on
